content:
# Water Shut Off

**Summary**: A technique used to block water from entering a wellbore, typically in high permeability zones or fractures.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-suleiman-4|Suleiman, 2024]] investigated nano-silica gel as an alternative for water shut-off treatments.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-suleiman-4|Suleiman, 2024]] A critical operation for managing reservoir conformance and extending the life of producing wells.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-suleiman-4|Suleiman, 2024]] Evaluated via coreflooding experiments on various sample types.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Nano-silica gel was found to be more durable than PAM/PEI gel over 6 months of aging. ([[2024-suleiman-4|Suleiman, 2024, p. 20]])
